rationale.R1.6: The agent's revisions significantly improved the writing polish, eliminating self-repetition and tightening phrasing while preserving technical claims.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent did not introduce new uncertainty disclosures, it preserved existing ones and added a note about not verifying cited references or figures.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres to the original scope, addressing the false-positive contamination problem in transit surveys.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content were introduced; the agent's revisions maintained the original's harm-free status.
rationale.RX.5: Unfortunately, the agent did not provide any annotations for non-cosmetic changes, making it difficult to trace the source of each revision.
